user.title: Set up AirSend
user.description:
The `airsend.yaml` file must be present in `/config`.
The internal URL is auto-detected if the AirSend addon is running.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AirSend
reconfigure.description: Reload configuration from `airsend.yaml` and update the URL if needed.

error.no_devices: No devices found in airsend.yaml. Check the `devices:` section.
error.yaml_not_found: File airsend.yaml not found in /config. Please create it first.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the AirSend addon. Check that the addon is running and the URL is correct.
error.timeout: The AirSend addon is not responding (timeout). Check that the addon is running.
error.no_url: Please enter the internal URL of the AirSend addon.
